page_metadata.biotools__summary: Server for the prediction of allosteric and regulatory sites on protein structures. It queries protein dynamics and structural conservation to identify pockets that may exert a regulatory effect upon binding of a small-molecule ligand.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Server for the prediction of allosteric and regulatory sites on protein structures. It queries protein dynamics and structural conservation to identify pockets that may exert a regulatory effect upon binding of a small-molecule ligand.
